message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant "Data Consumer" as DC
participant "Data Source" as DS

alt No updates
    DC -> DS : 1a. GET [query URL]
else
    DC -> DS : 1b. POST [base query URL] with
end

alt No updates
    DS --> DC : 2a. search-response Bundle with new records\n(use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
else
    DS --> DC : 2b. Empty search-response bundle
end

opt
    loop
        DC -> DS : 3a. GET [next URL]
        DS --> DC : 3b. search-response with Bundle of next results
    end
end

@enduml
```
